message:
docs: update README license references to MIT + OpenAI/Anthropic Rider

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
[![CI](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/xf/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/xf/actions/workflows/ci.yml) -[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) +[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT%2BOpenAI%2FAnthropic%20Rider-blue.svg)](./LICENSE)
@@ -1523,7 +1523,7 @@ xf index ~/x-archive --semantic --force # rebuild with ML embeddings ## License -MIT - see [LICENSE](LICENSE) for details. +MIT License (with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider) — see [LICENSE](LICENSE) for details. ---
